groups.label: Supabase account, storage and leaderboard backend

items.detail: Server-only key for target seeding, storage upload and doctors.

copyText:
Kickoff Lock Agent production secrets handoff
Ready: no
Manual missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_DB_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, APIFOOTBALL_KEY, FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL, FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, SYNAPSE_PRIVATE_KEY
Generated missing: KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_SIGNAL_MATRIX, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_CID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CIDS
Stale evidence: none
Next action: Fill manual production secrets first: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_DB_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, APIFOOTBALL_KEY, FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL, FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, SYNAPSE_PRIVATE_KEY.
Groups:
- Supabase account, storage and leaderboard backend [blocked]
  destination: local-env
  manual missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_DB_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
  generated missing: none
  stale evidence: none
  VITE_SUPABASE_URL: missing · bun run supabase:bootstrap · Public Supabase project URL.
  VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: missing · bun run supabase:bootstrap · Browser Supabase anon key.
  SUPABASE_DB_URL: missing · bun run supabase:schema:apply · Postgres URL for applying supabase.schema.sql.
  SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: missing · bun run seed:production-targets · Server-only key for target seeding, storage upload and doctors.
- Cloudflare Pages same-origin backend [blocked]
  destination: cloudflare-pages
  manual missing: APIFOOTBALL_KEY, FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL, FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN
  generated missing: none
  stale evidence: none
  APIFOOTBALL_KEY: missing · bun run pages:cf:preflight · Server-side API-Football key for /data-proxy enrichment.
  FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL: missing · bun run pages:cf:preflight · Trusted upstream /seal endpoint behind the same-origin Pages Function.
  FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN: missing · bun run pages:cf:preflight · Server-side upload token injected by the same-origin /seal proxy.
- Cloudflare deploy authorization [blocked]
  destination: cloudflare-deploy
  manual missing: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
  generated missing: none
  stale evidence: none
  CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: missing · bun run pages:cf:deploy · Cloudflare API token for CI or local non-OAuth deploy.
  CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: missing · bun run pages:cf:deploy · Cloudflare account id for Pages deploy.
- Real Filecoin seal upstream service [blocked]
  destination: seal-upstream
  manual missing: SYNAPSE_PRIVATE_KEY
  generated missing: none
  stale evidence: none
  SYNAPSE_PRIVATE_KEY: missing · bun run filecoin:api:check · Real Synapse private key for the upstream seal service.
  FILECOIN_PROOF_STORE_PATH: ready · bun run filecoin:api:check · Persistent proof registry path used by the upstream seal service.
- Generated production verification targets [blocked]
  destination: generated-evidence
  manual missing: none
  generated missing: KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_SIGNAL_MATRIX, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_CID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CIDS
  stale evidence: none
  KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS: generated · bun run data:providers:check && bun run scout:data-targets · Generated after live fixture scouting finds complete lineup, injury, odds and standings rows.
  KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_SIGNAL_MATRIX: generated · bun run data:providers:check && bun run scout:data-targets · Generated signal matrix proving each fixture has required intelligence rows.
  KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_CID: generated · bun run filecoin:bootstrap · Generated after the production record proof is sealed and read back.
  KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CIDS: generated · bun run filecoin:bootstrap · Generated after every required mode proof is sealed and read back.
  KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL: ready · bun run share:upload-image · Generated by uploading the record proof PNG to public Supabase Storage.
  KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL: ready · bun run share:upload-image -- --kind=mode --file=public/generated/kickoff-production-mode-share.png · Generated by uploading the mode proof PNG to public Supabase Storage.
